goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 17:30'.
The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should depart from 'norwich'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should arrive by 17:30
The train should leave on wednesday and should depart from norwich
Make sure you get train ID and travel time
